title.en: NON-PORTABLE LIGHTING DEVICES; SYSTEMS THEREOF; VEHICLE LIGHTING DEVICES SPECIALLY ADAPTED FOR VEHICLE EXTERIORS
Systems of lighting devices, not provided for in main groups F21S4/00 - F21S10/00 or F21S19/00, e.g. of modular construction
{of modular construction}
Lighting devices or systems using a string or strip of light sources
with light sources attached to loose electric cables, e.g. Christmas tree lights
with light sources held by or within elongate supports

Lighting devices intended to be free-standing (F21S9/00, F21S10/00, {F21S13/12} take precedence {lighting devices specially adapted to be transported from place to place, e.g. lighting devices carried on wheeled supports F21L; details of supports for lighting devices F21V21/00})
{candle-shaped}
{Table lamps, e.g. for ambient lighting}
{with a lamp housing in direct contact with the floor or ground}
{with a lamp housing maintained at a distance from the floor or ground via a support, e.g. standing lamp for ambient lighting}
Lighting devices intended for fixed installation (F21S9/00, F21S10/00 take precedence; using a string or strip of light sources F21S4/00)
{Searchlights, i.e. outdoor lighting device producing powerful beam of parallel rays, e.g. for military or attraction purposes (searchlights mounted on a vehicle B60Q1/245)}
{Solar simulators, e.g. for testing photovoltaic panels}
of recess-mounted type, e.g. downlighters (specially adapted for vehicle exteriors F21S41/00-F21S45/00)
{of surface-mounted type (F21S8/02, F21S8/04 take precedence; details of wall or floor bases F21V21/02)}
intended only for mounting on a ceiling or the like overhead structures (F21S8/02 takes precedence; {details of ceiling bases F21V21/03})
with a standard {(F21S6/00 takes precedence)}
Lighting devices with a built-in power supply; Systems employing lighting devices with a built-in power supply
the power supply being a battery or accumulator
the power supply being a generator
Lighting devices or systems producing a varying lighting effect
{using liquids, e.g. water}
{using light guides (light guides specially adapted for lighting devices G02B6/0001)}
{using rotating transparent or colored disks, e.g. gobo wheels}
changing colors {(F21S10/002 - F21S10/007, F21S10/04 take precedence)}
simulating flames
flashing, e.g. with rotating reflector or light source {(signalling lighting devices mounted on vehicles B60Q1/26)}

Non-electric lighting devices or systems using daylight {(hybrid lighting devices combining artificial and natural light F21S19/00; roofs with sky-light opening E04D13/03; sun blinds for windows with means for redirecting light onto ceiling of a room E06B9/00; solar heat collectors F24S)}
{characterised by the means for collecting or concentrating the sunlight, e.g. parabolic reflectors or Fresnel lenses}
{characterised by the means for transmitting light into the interior of a building}
Non-electric lighting devices or systems employing a point-like light source; Non-electric lighting devices or systems employing a light source of unspecified shape
Devices intended to be fixed, e.g. ceiling lamp, wall lamp
Devices intended to be free-standing, e.g. table lamp, floor lamp
Lighting systems
Non-electric lighting devices or systems employing light sources not covered by main groups F21S11/00, F21S13/00 or F21S19/00
Lighting devices or systems employing combinations of electric and non-electric light sources; Replacing or exchanging electric light sources with non-electric light sources or vice versa
{Combining sunlight and electric light sources for indoor illumination}
Illuminating devices specially adapted for vehicle exteriors, e.g. headlamps (reversing lights F21S43/00)
characterised by the light source
characterised by refractors, transparent cover plates, light guides or filters
characterised by reflectors
characterised by screens, non-reflecting members, light-shielding members or fixed shades
characterised by aesthetic components not otherwise provided for, e.g. decorative trim, partition walls or covers
characterised by a variable light distribution
Signalling devices specially adapted for vehicle exteriors, e.g. brake lamps, direction indicator lights or reversing lights
characterised by the light source
characterised by refractors, transparent cover plates, light guides or filters
characterised by reflectors
characterised by the combination of reflectors and refractors
characterised by aesthetic components not otherwise provided for, e.g. decorative trim, partition walls or covers
{characterised by variable optical properties, e.g. involving the use of LCD or movable parts}
Arrangements within vehicle lighting devices specially adapted for vehicle exteriors, for purposes other than emission or distribution of light
Protection of lighting devices (cooling of lighting devices F21S45/40; waterproofing of lighting devices F21S45/50)
Promoting gas flow in lighting devices, e.g. directing flow toward the cover glass for demisting (ventilation F21S45/30; forced cooling F21S45/42)
Ventilation or drainage of lighting devices
Cooling of lighting devices
Waterproofing
Heating of lighting devices, e.g. for demisting
Prevention of harmful light leakage
Details
Fastening or lifting of lamp glass
Manufacturing details of signalling devices specially adapted for vehicle exteriors
